missing_components.detail: Need a SHADOW_READY Base USDC/WETH opportunity with exact calldata built and eth_call PASS.
Need one passing eth_call for the exact atomic executor transaction before continuous live can run.

next_unblock_step: Wallet preflight is not ready for the isolated Base wallet.
notes: This engine is an execution-readiness state machine. It never signs, approves, swaps, or runs autonomous live arbitrage.
Manual approval and manual smoke-swap commands appear only when all prerequisite reports permit them.
Continuous live arbitrage requires a reviewed atomic executor path plus the live autopilot send flag; the current tiny pilot is one-leg smoke testing only.
Paper profits do not guarantee live profits because live execution can fail from gas, slippage, MEV, reverts, nonce issues, and pool movement.

unblock_path.detail: Paper max trade and observed fills must stay at or below the live cap, e.g. $20 for the tiny pilot.
unblock_path.name: Live-parity paper profile

unblock_path.detail: Execution-cost confidence must reach HIGH and execution realism must produce SHADOW_READY opportunities.
unblock_path.name: Execution evidence

unblock_path.detail: Build exact Base calldata and pass eth_call for the selected USDC/WETH route.
unblock_path.name: Transaction simulation

unblock_path.detail: Run approval and one tiny smoke swap only when the engine shows READY_FOR_MANUAL_APPROVAL or READY_FOR_MANUAL_SMOKE_SWAP.
unblock_path.name: Manual tiny live pilot

unblock_path.detail: Deploy/review the single-transaction arbitrage executor, approve USDC to that executor, and pass the atomic executor eth_call report before continuous live trading is allowed.
unblock_path.name: Atomic live executor
